title: frontend zoom/pan screen + reply textarea; main.rs SocketHerdr; LIVE verify vs real herdr; docs
action: Frontend: replace live-terminal view with an observe view = zoom/pan screen (poll GET screen ~1.5s, render ANSI via xterm as static renderer inside a pinch-zoom/pan viewport) + a Reply button revealing a textarea -> POST input -> clear. Remove ws.ts usage. api.ts: fetchScreen + sendInput. main.rs: SocketHerdr in non-demo, herdr.sock path config, supervisor keeps `herdr server` spawn. LIVE verify against real herdr (7 agents, open one, zoom/pan screen, reply lands on a throwaway/own pane). Update README/usage/DISCOVERY.

prohibitions: Do not send input to operator's live agents during automated tests

verify: cargo test --quiet && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings && cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run

trace.outcome: Frontend observe view: poll screen ~1.5s, xterm static renderer at natural width in scroll/zoom viewport (A-/A+ zoom, scroll pan), Reply FAB -> textarea -> POST input (submit toggle). Removed ws.ts. main.rs uses SocketHerdr (non-demo, socket path config). LIVE verified: SPA served, 7 real agents, real screen. Docs updated. Committed 334ea15.
trace.verification_evidence: web: 15 vitest (api screen/reply, stripAnsiLen, version), typecheck clean, bundle built. LIVE integrated: GET / 200 (SPA), 7 real agents statuses blocked/done/idle/working, real pane screen 67 lines with ANSI. send_input not probed on live agents (safety) — covered by Fake e2e + schema.
trace.verify_output: rust unit+e2e green, clippy+fmt clean, web 15 tests+bundle; live-verified vs real herdr (7 agents, real screen, proto 16)
trace.verify_command: cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cd web && npm run bundle && npm test -- --run
